textByHash.5ff42e27f3a5dacd106c02c5cab784b9526fe0e8: Why, yes, yes, that I am!
textByHash.bfef1a2e2a150d33ce6ea50f022e1390e1b9ed73: Oh, I don't need an assistant sculptor, really, I can do just fine on my own.
textByHash.73013fd0cce180e37728e58c6a76a0ca8b0c4128: And I've also got a model here, you see, to base my statue on.
textByHash.8dc52683410f239dcb8bdf0ea80ff74f5a40da18: But come to think of it, I do need some errands run. Yes, quite important errands too.
textByHash.f4eb5f11cb4cc67e1238a58133b13794a31f2754: Yes, you will do just fine.
textByHash.9fa8c0406c6f579c79fbda961b214c6145b3dbd8: Well, see... the Consortium has commisioned me to rebuild the statue exactly the way it was.
textByHash.5ddad06e951dbca112dd54c730b09e2f28414d7a: But the statue itself has broken into a million pieces... and we dwarves aren't very good painters, you know, so we don't have any paintings of it either.
textByHash.089da7726d25fbaff669050bcdc22dda95b283c6: No, that's not what I said, I said we're not very good painters.
textByHash.2fd3a767c84aa2b5e4153a98f29535b4cd47db9a: We're excellent with, for example, stone. Oh yes, quite good if I say so myself.
textByHash.f36d0e2742fef1bef35a7f89e758122e2d292dac: But I digress... simply speaking, I need some help with getting some items that I can base the new statue on.
textByHash.5488f40465b19f47fd7f87cac290d62b0c75bee4: Will you be able to help me with this?
textByHash.713337df7b337f5fe1dcaaf2a275e2cb0fa6410a: How rude is that? I don't think the Black Guard will be very pleased with you!
textByHash.e4c4be5e343d3122a54eaf8f63006793911f5020: Excellent, excellent! Now what I need is the following...
textByHash.b8b31981a1ae124cb73e21b1af71d8197bba002f: I will need a pair of boots, the most exquisite boots you can find. The more they look like the original the better, but I don't think you'll be able to find an exact match.
textByHash.e15b4878fc9843a0f142670b4bd9d0b7095060d1: For the torso, I need clothes that look like King Alvis' clothes. I'm not sure where you would be able to find that, but I'm sure you'll manage.
textByHash.d5cd385fbb421a7cfc235024079fed555298dc5d: Also, I need a battleaxe. Now this is particularly important. You are in luck, however, as I believe King Alvis' original axe still survives.
textByHash.3053c90bec5e6a11bd9889f4ff8d877e8b85326f: For now, , for now! I wish you good luck, and hurry back with the items!
textByHash.6f5878ff6caa75988c98b053a4c4a8a994802939: I don't know! You're supposed to find that out for me!
textByHash.fdf8c894149ed041e99d339b77e887a01df75f3e: But it's a beautiful city, Keldagrim is, I'm sure you'll see many things while you do these tasks!
textByHash.7fe4526acd4298504914ef955ac804653429d450: How are you getting along with those items?
textByHash.76714a289637e334dbb5818fcc0cbd312dc6cc47: Excellent, excellent! Go and give them to Riki over there so I can start my work on the base of the statue!
textByHash.9c57d898bde9bea252a9b00daaeb1b37f0fde566: Oh yes, Vermundi is a good woman, she's very reliable. Wonderful clothing. Give it to Riki please.
textByHash.233dfc51cde49f55cee679e7227fb949fa0f4f5c: What, that old thing? Is that a piece of rubbish you found in the garbage?
textByHash.c3bf79759f6e85d574bfb377468a8a19c9a6dcb9: It looks so brittle it might well fall apart at any moment. I can't base my statue on that!
textByHash.c2dc18899d9d9cbc0af70279c333c274adba11e9: Besides, from what I recall of the original axe, this doesn't even look anything like it.
textByHash.f7af142ed7448925c25673c8d2ad5b2b373b8c70: Good job! Riki is your man, right over there. Give it to him please!
textByHash.78231edcfa1ced0689ad3c49c9a6b08239dde6e2: Yes, yes, that will do just fine. There is only one problem now, I still need to make the head.
textByHash.ab61a20cfb4dc03bf040194853b20474b11ee709: Oh no, no no, apparantly the Consortium has decided that crowns are out of fashion. As well as kings. Well, kings have been out of fashion here for hundreds of years.
textByHash.13a9c245fb3ec97e2f918c18fbd67e77658f6495: I don't think they've quite made a decision on that. You see, I think each of the directors of the Consortium fancies their own face on top of the statue.
textByHash.1821d7ec25f9b69ceb9a6be0500547721114e6f6: Yes, the Consortium can be a little fickle like that, unfortunately.
textByHash.659354bd4262f0bb6a20002cd61934370519b0f6: But can you go and see if they've made a decision yet? I can't very well continue working on this statue without knowing what the face should look like, can I?
textByHash.a95ef513eb3c1c0e398bf0f6d3f031d67a84ec1d: Great! In the mean time, I'll build the statue up to the neck!
textByHash.bef9e1de76bfda95f5b8d8b786dc1958954517ef: Any word from the Consortium yet?
textByHash.b4331760d703ad385ac6ff33cd65973658ad25ce: Then please, try to persuade one of the directors to force the Consortium into a decision. I must finish this statue before I can move onto my other work.
textByHash.869ee6b65f5d9acf619ede77a87315106aa3dcd8: The new statue looks beautiful, don't you agree?
textByHash.cc015404cfef2764f0b8adeb762b145337a774ee: My finest piece of work, without a doubt.
textByHash.d43b4586fb2a2e3108fb95a35bb86024142db73e: If only! But no, they've been there for many thousands of years, actually. Been there before dwarven recorded history.
textByHash.ffceae5be6c7f31ad493a50078a1bceb44547423: Of course they were, don't be silly!
